title: Five ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ very nice smart watch.
text: I buy 1 of this smart watches at the beginning for my self, and I like it a lot, the watch get connected with my android phone fast and keep connected without any issue so I don't miss any notification when I'm working, battery life is very good I only have to charger one time a week, touch screen very responsive no problem, with the app you can customize the face watch, check you steps, blood pressure and all that, set up alarms and much more, one of the things I like it is they have over 250 face watches or you can used you own pic's to customize the face, that is why after few days of get mine I order 2 more one for my wife and one for my son and they are very happy too. Another good thing is the magnetic charger, on that way you don't have to take off the strap band like others brands, the strap band is very soft material isn't hard plastic.

title: This watch is WELL worth  it!
text:
After having this for awhile.
I have to say I'm impressed, this is by far a step above the rest. After having a fitbit. This is well worth the savings.

*** my biggest issue for me.. I can not get weather to stay connected to my location.
*Battery life is about 4 days-(for me), unless you are constantly messing with it.
* Screen, being I have terrible eyesight the screen is a nice size, only time I have a problem reading is when their are multiple numbers.
* bp, heart rate and 02 apps- they may not be 100 on the mark, however if you use it as a guide and not the rule. You can track those things and know your estimated numbers, after all its on your wrist.
*The charging cord is. awful, defidently needs upgrading. hard to get it to stay together, I made my own little holder to keep watch and. Charger connected.
*I DO NOT like the bands, the gold one broke within 1 week, the silicone one didn't stay closed, the little nubs that are suppo

title: The only thing I have heartburn with is the Manual...
text:
First of, I'm learning to love this smart watch...this is the first one I have ever had, so I didn't know anything about them. The only thing that caused serious displeasure was the manual...nowhere does it tell you clearly how to operate the watch. I actually had to chat with an Amazon agent for a long time, and he couldn't really figure out what was wrong. While I was chatting I accidentally found the functions that are hidden...sooo, for any other newbies, from the clock face (Home Screen) YOU HAVE TO SWIPE UPWARD TO FIND ALL THE FUNCTIONS. That is a big revelation for anyone who has never had a smart watch...

Other than that biggy, this smartwatch is really neat!! Simple to pair with the app, and after you get used to how you need to actually measure BP, etc. it keeps track of your health...really cool.

**UPDATE**

This one is far better than the other round one I got after this one...huge selling point is that this watch holds a charge for three day

title: Would have been 5 stars until
text:
Watch was as described. It is attractive and comfortable. Paired with smart phone app easily. Appeared to be accurate for steps, heartrate, blood pressure, oxygen level, and sleep. I purchased this mainly to track my steps and monitor BP and HR.
Purchased on June 22, 2021.
On September 17, 2021 the watch no longer tracks steps. I have tried turning off to reset, tightened the band, etc. Without resolution. Very disappointed. The window to return has passed. This rates 1 star for stated reasons.

title: Try it out!
text: I really like this smartwatch. It truly checks bp for you it does everything in description. Got it two days ago but will update if things change. The only think I really don’t like is that it’s not a yellow gold it’s more of a copper color. All in all I still like it I’m just going to go purchase another band for it maybe purple lol. It’s also heavy in weight which I do like……………ok bought watch in July so now it’s September got watch wet for first time three days ago still worked fine. Put watch on charger last night took off this morning and watch is wasted lol

title: Best value smartwatch
text: I have used several smartwatches over the past few years. But none of the watches gave performance like this one. This is the best smartwatch I have ever used.  I exercise daily in the morning and in the evening.  This is definitely the best smartwatch if you workout daily.  It has great battery life. And of course, the look is amazing. And it's very easy to use.  I highly recommend it.

title: Not What I Expected
text: I basically brought this to track my sleep patterns. Just found out it only tracks your sleep from 11a to 7am, which they don't tell you. Found this out by reading other customers questions. I have irregular sleep patterns with my mostly not going to bed until 3am and rising around noon. So this is mostly useless to me. The battery only lasts from 24-48 hours. The so called directions that come with it are also useless. Will probably return.

title: Great Watch for Great Price
text:
Offers most of the features of my old Samsung Active 2 watch for about 1/6 of the price. Most of controls and settings must be done through the phone app rather than directly through the watch's menu. The app offers a large variety of faces, including one that you can customize. I am impressed with the information one can gather on the phone app. The alarm does not provide very strong vibration, so I've slept through several early morning "wake-ups" (and set up a back-up alarm on my cell phone). Considering that the Samsung watch died before it was completely paid for under Samsung's financing program, and the estimated cost of repairing the Active 2 was almost twice the cost of this watch, the choice was a no-brainer. This as a very attractive watch and has excellent battery life. I charged the watch 3 days ago and have nearly 70% charge still left. My old Samsung's battery lasted at best for 2 days.
It will be interesting to see how long this new watch lasts. It is supposed

title: BEST SMARTWATCH I HAVE EVER OWNED!
text: Best smartwatch I've seen in a long time. Believe me, I've purchased my share of watches over the last few years. This one has a long lastng battery, great band (easy to put on), lots of choices/options and a software that works well and is close to being about everything I need. You can use your own pictures for the watch face (it is limited however). The watch only stores 4 watch faces to choose from at a time but maybe in the future they could give you more options. It is easy to use the options available, which are fairly numerous when you consider other watches I've owned. I would like to see more options as to what you can view on the watch face at any given time. It only takes about an hour or so to charge the watch when needed (depending on how low you let the battery to get). Another plus, it is waterproof. Overall, I AM VERY PLEASED. I am thinking of buying a second one to have on hand in case this one bites the dust (probably due to my own use).

title: Nice watch
text: Gold metal band looks nice, watch has many features, easy to use, but instructions are very cryptic. Battery life is excellent. Sleep monitoring quit working after 1 week. Mobile APP ok.

title: Bang for your buck
text:
[[VIDEOID:5300b168cb3fbcf248b0c5b6719792f9]] Pros: great watch
Waterproof in a full shower.
Syncs with your phone.
Offers hundreds of watch faces on the app.
Forwards messages.
Forwards notifications in the form of text message from all your apps
Alerts you with phone calls.
Measures steps taken. Calories burned. O2 levels. Heart Rate. Blood Pressure.
Syncs with iPhone health app.
Handles music controls.
Captures pictures.
Finds devices.
Long charge.

Cons: doesn’t track sleep that great. It doesn’t accurately measure my sleep.
Does not allow any text message replies.
Does not allow phone answering.
Charger is magnetic and can be a pain to keep positioned right.
Doesn’t show images sent via text.

title: Swim Watch
text: I really like this watch. It's more accurate than any of my other fitness watches. I'm still learning about all the features, but so far I am enjoying it very much.

title: Wish I would have googled the instruction manual first
text:
I have small hands. The instruction manual for the watch is about the size of my palm, no fingers, just the size of my palm. If the manual were 8 1/2" x 11", I would need a magnifying glass to read it anyway. I think I tore a muscle in my eye trying to strain to even figure out where the pertinent information is located within the manual.

So, I google it, and find the manual online. The online manual is so pixillated, because the teeeeeny, tiiiiiinny instruction manual that came with the watch has just been enlarged to the point it is STILL illegible. You gotta be kidding me!

I'm not holding out much hope to get this watch operational with the app. I will update this review if I manage to figure it out.

**UPDATE
It only took me a couple days to get this watch functional. It's constantly dropping some function to the point where I have to restore it from the app. After about two days, it lost all BP records, O2 sats, pulse, etc. AT LEAST IT WAS

title: I'm in love with AI
text:
This Hero comes with a pink rubber adjustable band as well.
I am tiny but LOVE the big look!
I also love the rose gold color!

title: Watch wont charge anymore less than two months
text:
I'm not so happy with this watch. Less than two months later the watch stops being able to receive a charge. And I know this because I tested the cable and that puts out power but the watch wont take it. I DO NOT RECOMMEND!! NOT GOOD!!

Before this, app was mediocre, I wish the "wrist sense" would turn off for when sleeping because it turns on in the night. Other than these things the watch does its job but not for long obviously because of the battery.

title: Nice watch!
text: Easy to use and see on wrist. Like the features and wide face. Bought a more narrow band because the wide ones are uncomfortable for me. Easy to change bands. Metal band is attractive but is wide and pulls arm hair and pinches a little. It doesn't give as many details as my more expensive fitbit but flat face is much more comfortable. It doesn't track my sleep patterns very accurately. Says I was awake when I was sleeping peacefully. Haven't mastered camera yet even though I've tried a few times but it does vibrate when I get notifications better than my android cell which I like. When this wears out I intend to buy a more expensive one but for now it is good. Like bp, heart rate and oxygen readings.

title: The watch slow burned my wrist
text: I wore this watch for 2 months straight. A couple weeks in I saw a light red mark on my wrist. I didn’t have the watch on right but I loosened it just in case. It just got worse and started to hurt. I tried cleaning the back every day then a couple times a day while not wearing it at night. I can’t believe I wasted my money on this thing. Also, the sleep tracker DOES NOT WORK. It would tell me I got 8 hours sleep when I got maybe 6. If you sit still later at night it assumes you are asleep. So if you want to know how long you really sleep with this thing jump up and down while you do whatever you are doing late at night. Save up for a better watch. Do not buy this piece of crap.

title: Mixed feelings..
text: Bought this watch in April, it is now 3 months old.  I find it does not track sleep well.. I am an early riser and get to bed early, usually in bed 9-9:30 pm up at 4 AM  It does not track my sleep til 10:10 pm or 12:10 am.  it continually shows that I sleep maybe 3-4 hours a night.  After 2 bouts of cancer and one of COVID my body needs at least 6 hours of sleep and will not function on 3-4 hours. So I know after over a month of 3-4 hr sleep I would not be functioning.  Otherwise I love the watch... battery life is good..and the watch stay connected well to my phone.

title: Amazing product
text: [[VIDEOID:dee661d997586eec5083d2b08a16e7fe]] Really good product! I like how it looks. Also lot of screensavers to choose from.

title: Impressed with functions
text: Looks good, easy to set up (even for someone technically-challenged). Excellent value compared to other options.

title: Simplemente espectacular
text: [[VIDEOID:300f8a2a174cebdbf6d1f6090d9befa]] Esta super practico y espectacular solo le falta que se pudiera hablar del mismo reloj.

title: I hope this was useful...
text: I love this watch. The mobile app works well. Only thing ever-so-often it for some reason disconnect from the phone. All I do is restart my phone and it connect to the phone again. Or just go to setting and reconnect. Battery life is just as posted on Amazon.I can go 5-6 days without charging. Touchscreen is easy to use. It show your incoming calls, but you can't answer from the watch. I recieve all necessary notifications on the watch.
